object_a.label: fan
object_a.description: Ceiling fan with light and wooden blades
object_a.long_form_open_description: Five-blade ceiling fan with medium-dark wooden blades and an integrated domed light in the center. Mounted on the ceiling roughly above the bed, providing the main overhead fixture.
object_a.location_relative_to_other_objects: Centered above the bed/headboard; mounted to ceiling

object_b.label: fan
object_b.description: ceiling fan with light fixture in the bedroom
object_b.long_form_open_description: Ceiling-mounted fan with multiple blades and an integrated light kit located above the bed in the adjacent bedroom. Fan is centered in the bedroom ceiling and visible through the doorway; light appears off.
object_b.location_relative_to_other_objects: Directly above the bed in the center of the bedroom; visible through the doorway above the headboard.
